You can follow…

items.title: Hollander POTD Armen Gilliam. Star UNLV PF drafted 2nd by PHO in 87. Underwhelmed in PHO but developed into a good low post scorer. Contrary to bio was not timid but wasn't a good passer. Peaked at 18 ppg 9 rpg for NJ in 95-96. Retired in 2000 at age 35. Sadly died young. RIP.

items.title: Saturday will mark the second Game 7 in NBA history between two teams who each had a .750+ win pct in the regular season.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Saturday will mark the second Game 7 in NBA history between two teams who each had a .750+ win pct in the regular season.

The other came in the 1981 Eastern Conference Finals, when the Celtics beat the 76ers 91-90 to complete their comeback from a 3-1 series deficit.

(via OptaSports)
#NBA

items.title: Victor Wembanyama produced his fifth 25-point, 10-rebound game of the 2026 NBA Playoffs.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Victor Wembanyama produced his fifth 25-point, 10-rebound game of the 2026 NBA Playoffs.

At 22 years and 144 days old, he’s the youngest player in league history to record five such games in a single postseason.

(via @statitudes.com)
#NBA
